ES | EN

Comprehensive Family Medicine

Digestive Disorders, Intolerances, and Allergies

We specialize in the comprehensive approach to conditions that significantly affect the quality of life of our patients, with a particular focus on:

Chronic Digestive Disorders

From irritable bowel syndrome to functional dyspepsia and other conditions that alter the balance of the digestive system, we investigate the underlying causes and offer personalized solutions to restore your comfort and digestive health.

Well-being without compromising necessary nutrition, especially in food intolerances in children.

Food Intolerances

Often confused with allergies, food intolerances can manifest with a wide range of symptoms.

Through precise diagnosis and treatment, we help the body assimilate food normally so that at the end of the treatment, it treats the previously harmful food as new, so it no longer causes symptoms.

Asthma and Allergies in Children/Adults

Allergic diseases, including childhood asthma, rhinitis, and dermatitis, are increasingly prevalent, especially in the child population. Our approach focuses on identifying allergens, treating and eliminating their harmful action, and strengthening the immune system.

We treat the family

Inspired by a vision of medicine that goes beyond the symptom, we integrate the principles of family medicine with advanced diagnostic and therapeutic methodologies. We recognize that the body is an interconnected system and that, in many cases, digestive disorders and allergies are rooted in deeper imbalances.

We are committed to providing personalized care that is fundamentally family-oriented. We understand that an individual's health, especially a child's, is often intertwined with their family context and history. Therefore, Dr. Enrique Fernández San José and his team invite the family unit (parents and children) to be treated together. By diagnosing and treating the whole family, we can understand the root cause of the disease, identify common patterns and predisposing factors, and address the disease not only at the individual level but in its entire family ecosystem. Every patient is listened to, and their clinical history, as well as their family's, is thoroughly analyzed.

This allows us to design comprehensive treatment strategies that may include, in addition to conventional medicine, approaches such as Homeopathy and Complete Detoxification, seeking to optimize the immune response and eliminate the toxic burdens that contribute to disease in all members.

Furthermore, we explore cutting-edge complementary therapies such as Bioresonance, an innovative therapy that allows us to identify and correct energetic imbalances, making it a valuable tool in the treatment of allergies and digestive problems for the whole family.

Comprehensive Support for Post-Vaccine Sequelae

Everything that EXISTS possesses and emits a unique frequency and wavelength, like a fingerprint.


Every FREQUENCY is vibrational information.


Every VIBRATION – INFORMATION is susceptible to being modified.

The bio-frequency-based treatment harmonizes your body and eliminates the vaccine signal

Healthy Signal (Harmonic)

Vaccine Signal (Disharmonic)

Therapeutic Output (Cancellation and Amplification)

At the forefront of integral medicine, we recognize the growing need to address the sequelae of COVID and concerns related to post-vaccine treatments. Many patients experience a variety of persistent symptoms after a COVID-19 infection, known as persistent COVID or post-COVID syndrome, as well as new symptoms or imbalances following vaccination.

We offer a meticulous approach to evaluating and treating these complex conditions. Through an exhaustive medical diagnosis that considers the overall state of the immune system, residual viral load, and possible organic imbalances, we design personalized treatment strategies. These may include protocols for complete detoxification to help the body eliminate burdens and restore its natural balance, as well as support therapies to modulate the immune response, reduce inflammation, and alleviate persistent symptomatology. Our goal is to help you recover your comprehensive health and well-being after these experiences, strengthening your body holistically.

“Before you heal someone, ask him if he's willing to give up the things that make him sick.”

— Hippocrates

“Health depends on being in harmony with our souls.”

— Edward Bach

“Medicine must integrate body, soul, and spirit for treatment to be true and lasting.”

— Rudolf Steiner

“The true doctor not only prescribes, but listens, understands, and guides toward balance.”

— Anonymous

“Homeopathy does not treat diseases, but people who are sick.”

— André Saine

“The body whispers before it screams; the attentive doctor listens to the silence of the disease before it manifests.”

— Proposed Quote

“Technology heals, chemistry acts, but the soul is cured in the presence of love and listening.”

— Proposed Quote

“The physician's high and only mission is to restore the sick to health, to cure, as it is termed.”

— Samuel Hahnemann

“The good physician treats the disease; the great physician treats the patient who has the disease.”

— William Osler

Clinic Locations

Clinic in La Herradura, 50 minutes from Malaga and Granada

Paseo Andrés Segovia nº 35, 1ºC 18697 La Herradura / Granada

The clinic is located one hour from Malaga airport, in the coastal town of La Herradura.

Clinic in Bilbao

Albia Building, San Vicente Street, SPANPKOR Business Center - Sixth Floor
Bilbao, Vizcaya
Nearby parking: Pio Baroja

In the northern area, we periodically hold consultations in Bilbao; you can request an appointment for the next consultation date at any time, and we will inform you when the dates become available.

The next treatment in Bilbao:
From April 1, 2026
to April 30, 2026

Request an early appointment by calling +34 629 43 41 82
Limited Places.

International Consultation

For patients from the rest of Spain and abroad, we recommend contacting us well in advance, as they can catch a round-trip flight to Malaga on the same day taking advantage of airfare offers.

We will provide you with a reliable taxi service from Malaga airport to the clinic in La Herradura, so that after the treatment you can return to the airport for your return trip or opt for a hotel for your rest.

Call us at +34 629 43 41 82 and we will recommend the best option for you.

Book appointment

Call us at +34 629 43 41 82

Monday to Friday, call to book an appointment, change an appointment (with 48 hours notice) or to request any type of information or consultation.

We are at your service!
